48,0.0,0.03526901,0.6619737,0.031155583,0.16316381,0.0025713898,0.0016528722,0.059448764,0.005920739,0.13459913,0.0,2.7019763,0.04418863,1.0916908,0.19160248,0.0063525774,0.014584495,0.0076474817,0.055743802,0.06255476,0.11360078,0.0,0.03402337,0.085345365,0.0,0.004213322,0.17033465,0.029815393,0.13698937,1.144975,0.24626023,0.20128343,0.014373037,0.0,0.25378358,0.95833725,0.12277476,0.028704306,0.20518614,0.044324763,0.0008013784,0.13617396,0.06369151,0.069555946,0.013514103,0.0,0.16608186,0.17720996,0.033450574,0.04076124,0.17277256,0.0031773197,0.022914357,0.040784497,0.0070326263,0.2852911,0.0070217475,0.12687705,0.30323493,0.15017527,0.0,0.37982962,0.0032320977,0.4253655,0.027232258,0.5616551,0.005239788,0.0057504037,0.0020887842,0.26028457,0.005671259,0.0,0.030764833,0.50412935,0.114209644,0.0,1.490955,0.0020888401,0.13768195,0.0054264227,0.33440012,0.13008693,0.2676921,0.66863424,0.0651047,0.21846208,0.0,0.11954189,0.46681148,0.013040069,0.00017472054,0.20984426,0.0066591417,0.05356708,0.07642934,7.295096e-05,1.470641,0.11030328,1.1756636,0.0,0.5762033,0.18450639,0.24095543,0.00023059826,2.1440597,0.0,0.9713786,0.0015122369,0.30580968,0.026374461,0.01595801,0.061655924,0.0,0.09557316,0.0023098297,0.0007760136,0.3204983,0.19739275,0.13103852,0.0183443,0.0,0.0009706891,0.0044935048,0.0118072145,3.6441538,0.0025931734,0.18626517,0.0292667,0.18631881,0.26691702,0.14076604,0.4518152,0.050954077,0.036141608,0.122291796,0.0019294033,0.08687071,0.5814924,0.015964204,0.054701213,0.0059199277,0.8431246,0.037031986,0.22033615,0.025324717,0.10529674,0.01438306,0.00042865565,0.35104236,0.0071847355,0.11082273,0.44951543,1.2455682,0.02592588,0.12624367,0.040521424,0.45732623,0.1620939,0.8773762,0.607106,0.13732007,3.3889897,0.0,0.06722527,0.005565034,0.0845279,0.75375754,0.0,0.5618769,0.09341648,0.0,0.07219216,0.39639574,0.2990768,0.0,0.4021395,0.24411555,0.3013706,0.43854886,0.29209885,0.34742805,0.20836419,0.9922628,0.18454234,0.06291339,0.12816124,0.12885596,0.01992391,
